title: Contract
description: Spawned exactly once when a tender is AWARDED. PR 1 carries identity + obligations only; payment-clock logic is PR 2. entity_id nullable for future multi-entity support. No numeric confidence/risk scores.

entity_id.description: Nullable — reserved for future multi-entity support.

xi4a_covered.description: True when this is a GFO XI.4.A not-for-profit prompt-contracting contract (drives the nfp_renewal_notice_watch obligation).
